overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing Link traversing a snowy mountain at night. The character walks through deep snow, climbs a steep rock face, and reaches the summit while light snow falls under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain slope with distant peaks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through deep snow toward a rocky cliff face in the distance

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered mountain slope with tall grass poking through the snow
dark mountain silhouettes against the night sky
clear dark sky filled with stars and falling snow particles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain slope under a starry night sky. Link walks steadily uphill through deep snow, heading toward a rocky cliff face visible in the distance. The environment is serene and empty, with only the sound of footsteps in the snow.

events.description: transitions from walking on snow to climbing up the rock face
white wolf appears briefly on the snow slope to the right

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky cliff face using hands and feet, navigating the vertical terrain

notable_agents.action: white wolf standing on the snow slope observing the character before disappearing from view

entered.detail: steep dark rock face with rough texture and patches of snow

segments.scene_description: Link reaches the cliff and begins climbing, transitioning from the open snowfield to the enclosed rock face. The camera follows the ascent from behind and above. A white wolf appears briefly in the distance on the right, watching from the snow before Link continues upward out of view.

events.description: reaches the top of the cliff and transitions back to walking on snow-covered ground

agents.ego_description: walking across the snowy summit with snow-covered pine trees visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: flat snow-covered mountain top with wind-swept snow drifts
distant pine trees covered in snow on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Link reaches the summit and steps back onto snow-covered ground, leaving the cliff face behind. The scene opens up again to a wide snowy plateau with snow-covered trees visible in the distance ahead. The character continues walking forward across the pristine snow under the starry sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, snowy mountain slope up a steep cliff face and onto a high plateau under a starry night sky. It begins with Link walking steadily uphill through deep snow toward a distant rocky cliff in a serene, empty environment. As he reaches the cliff, the scene shifts from the open field to an enclosed rock face, with the camera following the ascent from behind while a white wolf briefly watches from the snow below. The perspective then opens up again as Link reaches the summit and steps back onto snow-covered ground, leaving the cliff behind. Finally, the camera moves forward across a pristine snowy plateau toward distant snow-covered trees under the clear, starlit sky.
